data.name: App_StartError
data.value: Felova couldn't start. Close it and open it again.

data.name: Welcome_Tagline
data.value: A health diary for the animals you love

data.name: Welcome_Reassurance
data.value: Takes about a minute. You can change it later.

data.name: Settings_DeleteConfirmMessage
data.value: This deletes every pet, entry, medication, and setting on this device. It can't be undone.

data.name: Settings_WebsiteSubtitle
data.value: What Felova does, and what's coming

data.name: Main_MoodEmptyState
data.value: You can note how your pet's feeling in the Journal

data.name: Main_WeightEmptyCard
data.value: No weigh-ins yet. Add one in the Journal.

data.name: Main_MoodEmptyCard
data.value: No moods yet. Add one in the Journal.

data.name: Journal_EmptySub
data.value: Quiet days are good days too.

data.name: Journal_GlucoseSub
data.value: {0:ddd, d MMM}. One number, and you're done.

data.name: CondSetup_DiabetesSub
data.value: How often should Felova ask for a glucose check?

data.name: CondSetup_RangeHint
data.value: No range yet? Leave it empty. Readings are simply recorded, without judgement, until you add one.

data.name: CondSetup_RangeError
data.value: That range needs a low and a high, low first.

data.name: CondSetup_CkdSub
data.value: Weight, appetite, and water tell the story here

data.name: CondSetup_EpilepsySub
data.value: Nothing to schedule. Just a place to write it down.

data.name: CondSetup_EpilepsyBody
data.value: Seizures can't be planned, so this adds a seizure log instead of a daily task. It waits under + in the Journal, ready for when it happened, how long it lasted, and what you noticed.

data.name: Manage_IdentityHint
data.value: Tap to edit name, type, or age

data.name: Manage_CarePlanNote
data.value: What the Journal will ask for

data.name: Manage_RemovePetConfirmBody
data.value: This deletes their medications, their timeline, and every note. It can't be undone.

data.name: Manage_RemovePetConfirmBodyBackup
data.value: This deletes their medications, their timeline, and every note, from your backup and everyone sharing their care. It can't be undone.

data.name: Manage_EmptyPlan
data.value: Nothing set up yet. And that's okay too.

data.name: Manage_Event
data.value: written down as it happens · waits under +

data.name: Manage_AddConditionSub
data.value: This sets up the right trackers

data.name: Manage_RemoveLinked
data.value: This set up: {0}. All history is kept either way. Nothing is ever deleted.

data.name: Manage_RemoveNoLinked
data.value: No trackers came from this condition. All history is kept.

data.name: Weight_EmptyState
data.value: Add a few weigh-ins to see the trend

data.name: ConditionPicker_Sub
data.value: Pick any that apply, and Felova will note the right things for {0}. You can change this later.

data.name: Pets_ExportSubtitle
data.value: One page to print or share

data.name: Export_DoneMessage
data.value: Your summary of the last {0} days is ready. It's all on one page.

data.name: Docs_Empty
data.value: No summaries yet. You can make one any time.

data.name: Export_NoData
data.value: Nothing written down in this period yet.

data.name: Export_Failed
data.value: Couldn't make the summary. Please try again.

data.name: Calendar_HowFeeling
data.value: How is your pet feeling today?

data.name: Med_EmptySubtitle
data.value: Add a medication and Felova will remind you when it's time.

data.name: MedEdit_NotesPlaceholder
data.value: e.g. with food, after a meal…

data.name: CreatePet_Identity_Subtitle
data.value: Just the basics for now. You can change this later.

data.name: CreatePet_Details_Subtitle
data.value: This helps Felova follow your pet's health over time.

data.name: CreatePet_PhotoError
data.value: Couldn't add that photo. Please try another.

data.name: CreatePet_PhotoPermissionDenied
data.value: Photo access was denied. You can allow it in Settings.

data.name: CreatePet_BirthdayHint
data.value: Only the year is required. Add the month and day if you know them.

data.name: CreatePet_ConditionsSubtitle
data.value: You can add conditions from the pet's profile later

data.name: PetTypePage_WhatType
data.value: What type of animal do you have?

data.name: Validation_PetNameRequired
data.value: Please add a name for your pet.

data.name: Validation_BirthDayInvalid
data.value: Enter a valid day for that month.

data.name: Validation_BirthDayNeedsMonth
data.value: Add the month before the day.

data.name: Validation_BirthdayFuture
data.value: The birthday can't be in the future.

data.name: Validation_DosagePositive
data.value: The dose should be a number above zero.

data.name: Validation_SelectPet
data.value: Please choose a pet for this medication.

data.name: Validation_SelectDay
data.value: Please choose at least one day.

data.name: Notif_MissedBodyOne
data.value: {1} wasn't recorded while your device was off. It's still open when you're ready.

data.name: Notif_MissedBodyMany
data.value: {0} has {1} {2} doses still open from while your device was off.

data.name: Notif_MoodCheckInBody
data.value: You can note how {0} is feeling when you have a moment.

data.name: Notif_WeightCheckInBody
data.value: A quick weigh-in for {0}, whenever suits you.

data.name: Settings_ResetDeviceOnly
data.value: This device only. Keep my backup.

data.name: Cloud_RowSubtitleOff
data.value: Off. Your data stays on this device.

data.name: Cloud_IntroSubtitle
data.value: Backup and sharing, only if you want it

data.name: Cloud_IntroBody
data.value: Create an account to back up your pet's data and keep it in sync across your devices. Felova stays private by default. Nothing leaves this device until you turn on backup yourself.

data.name: Cloud_CodeBody
data.value: We sent a 6-digit code to {0}. Enter it below.

data.name: Cloud_ResetBody
data.value: Enter your email and we'll send you a recovery code.

data.name: Cloud_BackupOffBody
data.value: Backup is off. Turning it on uploads the pets on this device to your account and keeps them in sync from then on.

data.name: Cloud_EnabledOffline
data.value: Backup is on. It'll sync once you're back online.

data.name: Cloud_SignOutHint
data.value: Signing out keeps your data on this device and in your backup.

data.name: Cloud_DeleteAccountConfirmMessage
data.value: This permanently deletes your account and everything backed up to it. The data on this device stays.

data.name: Cloud_ErrNetwork
data.value: No connection. Please try again in a moment.

data.name: Cloud_ErrEmailTaken
data.value: There's already an account with this email.

data.name: Cloud_ErrNotConfirmed
data.value: Please confirm your email first. We sent you a code.

data.name: Cloud_ErrCode
data.value: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.

data.name: Cloud_ErrWeakPassword
data.value: Please choose a longer password, at least 6 characters.

data.name: Cloud_ErrRateLimited
data.value: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.

data.name: Cloud_ErrGeneric
data.value: That didn't go through. Please try again.

data.name: Cloud_SharingRowSubtitle
data.value: Invite someone to share the care

data.name: Cloud_InviteCodeHint
data.value: Share this code. It works once and expires in 7 days.

data.name: Cloud_ShareCodeText
data.value: Help me care for {0} on Felova. My invite code: {1}

data.name: Cloud_LeaveConfirmMessage
data.value: You'll lose access, and this pet's data will be removed from your device.

data.name: Cloud_NotSyncedYet
data.value: This pet hasn't finished syncing yet. Try again in a moment.

data.name: Cloud_ErrInviteInvalid
data.value: That code is invalid or has expired. Ask for a new one.

data.name: Cloud_ErrAlreadyMember
data.value: You already care for this pet.
